news.headline: Avaada seeks $800 million to refinance Brookfield Asset Management debt
news.summary: The funds will come from offshore loans and local bonds. This refinancing will replace part of the debt from Brookfield Asset Management. Avaada is expanding its renewable energy and manufacturing businesses.

news.headline: Bankinter and Plenium Secure $617 Million for 130 MW Solar Portfolio
news.summary: Bankinter Investment and Plenium Partners have secured €530 million (~$617 million) in financing for a 130 MW solar portfolio…

news.headline: KEC Secures ₹13 Billion Orders Across Wind, Transmission Projects
news.summary: Mumbai-based engineering, procurement, and construction (EPC) company, KEC International, secured multiple orders totaling ₹13.03 billion (~$136.15 million) across various business verticals.KEC has secured orders for transmission and distribution projects across India and the Americas. news.headline: APTEL Refuses to Stay Karnataka Regulator’s Orders Condoning Solar Project Delays
news.summary: The Appellate Tribunal for Electricity (APTEL) has rejected two interim applications filed by Bangalore Electricity Supply Company (BESCOM) seeking a stay of the Karnataka Electricity Regulatory Commission’s (KERC) orders condoning delays by renewable energy developers in commissioning solar proj

news.headline: CERC Drafts New Deviation Settlement Rules for Hybrid Power, Storage Projects
news.summary: The Central Electricity Regulatory Commission (CERC) has proposed changes to the framework governing deviation settlement, infirm power injection, and payment timelines. The draft CERC (DSM and Related Matters) (Third Amendment) Regulations, 2026, revise definitions linked to the weighted average

news.headline: CleanMax Secures $575 Million for 1 GW Solar, Wind Projects
news.summary: Listen to this article Mumbai-headquartered renewable energy solutions provider Clean Max Enviro Energy Solutions (CleanMax) announced that it secured nearly $575 million to expand its

news.headline: Solarworld’s Q4 Revenue Doubles as its Solar and BESS Manufacturing Scales
news.summary: Uttar Pradesh-based renewable energy company Solarworld Energy Solutions reported consolidated revenue from operations of ₹5.92 billion (~$61.94 million) in the fourth quarter (Q4) of the financial year (FY) 2026, up 236% compared to ₹1.76 billion (~$18.42 million) a year earlier.

news.headline: MENA Weekly Round-Up: Masdar Selects Sungrow for UAE RTC Renewable Project
news.summary: Masdar selected Sungrow as the battery storage and solar inverter supplier for the UAE’s planned 24/7 dispatchable renewable energy project.

news.headline: Karnataka High Court Rules Solar Inverters Attract 5% GST and Not 18%
news.summary: Listen to this article The Karnataka High Court has held that solar inverters will qualify for a concessional 5% Goods and Services Tax (GST) rate

news.headline: Telangana Invites Bids for 19 MW Solar Projects in Nine Districts
news.summary: The Telangana Renewable Energy Development Corporation (TGREDCO) has invited bids to install and commission solar projects of 19 MW capacity at 18 substations across nine districts under CAPEX mode.

news.headline: Delhi Test House gains IEC CBTL recognition for solar PV module testing
news.summary: Delhi Test House, a leading testing laboratory in the renewable energy sector, has received recognition as an IEC CB Testing Laboratory (CBTL) under the internationally acclaimed IECEE CB Scheme by SGS Belgium, marking a major

news.headline: KIOCL floats tender for 2.7 MWp floating PV project in Karnataka
news.summary: KIOCL Limited has invited bids for a floating solar photovoltaic (PV) power plant at its blast furnace unit reservoir in Mangaluru, Karnataka. According to the tender guidelines, the scope of work includes design, engineering, supply,

news.headline: Adani Green Energy commissions 3.37 GWh BESS in Gujarat
news.summary: Adani Green Energy Limited (AGEL) has commissioned a cumulative capacity of 3.37 GWh battery energy storage system (BESS) at Khavda, Gujarat. The deployment includes the 1.37 GWh capacity commissioned in March 2026, taking AGEL’s total

news.headline: ACME inks 300 MW FDRE PPA with SECI
news.summary: ACME Solar Holdings Limited, through its subsidiary ACME Renewtech Sixth Private Limited, has entered into a 25-year power purchase agreement (PPA) with Solar Energy Corporation of India Limited (SECI). The agreement is for 300 MW/1,200

news.headline: EDF and partners sign 200 MW wind power PPA in Ontario
news.summary: EDF Power Solutions North America, Red Rock Indian Band, and Fort William First Nation have signed a power purchase agreement (PPA) with Ontario’s Independent Electricity System Operator (IESO) for the 200 MW Northern Breeze Energy

news.headline: ZOE Energy Storage and Saudi company join forces for BESS manufacturing facility
news.summary: ZOE Energy Storage has partnered with a Saudi company to establish a battery energy storage system (BESS) manufacturing facility. The BESS will be developed in two phases, with Phase I delivering 6 GWh capacity by

news.headline: Nordex commences production at blade manufacturing facility in Turkey
news.summary: The Nordex Group has commenced production at its new blade manufacturing facility in Turkey. The facility is expected to produce up to 1,200 rotor blades annually at full capacity. The facility will manufacture rotor blades

news.headline: CleanMax secures $575 million for 1 GW renewable energy projects in India
news.summary: Clean Max Enviro Energy Solutions, a renewable energy solutions provider for the commercial and industrial sector, has raised $575 million to support the development of around 1 GW of solar and wind projects across the Indian states of Rajasthan and Karnataka.

news.headline: No blanket extension of ALMM List II beyond June 1, 2026

news.headline: Adani Green Energy commissions 3.37 GWh battery energy storage system at Khavda
news.summary: Adani Green Energy Ltd (AGEL) has commissioned a cumulative 3.37 GWh battery energy storage system (BESS) at Khavda, Gujarat, including 1.37 GWh added in March 2026.
